# External evaluation data

This folder contains the actual results from all 67 games in the 2026 men's NCAA tournament.

The results are used only to evaluate the model trained through 2025. They are not used as training data.

Sources:

- https://www.ncaa.com/brackets/basketball-men/d1/2026
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_NCAA_Division_I_men%27s_basketball_tournament
